title: CaseOh Totem
description: This project adds a custom totem sound, particle, and texture for the Totem of Undying
body:
This is a pack that adds Caseoh as a totem.
What it adds:

1. New hotdog particals on use.
2. When used, it plays the sound that has Caseoh state, "Yup your banned."
3. Adds a new texture for the totem shown as the pack icon.
4. Renames the totem to "**CaseOh**"
5. Puts the totem under a new category instead of the combat category its under "Waffle house."
